[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101001 3
1 00101000 2
2 00111001 4
3 00000000 a
4 01101111 6
5 01000100 2
6 00101001 3
7 10101110 5

01 10 01000100 2 match 5
12 21 00000000 a match 3
23 32 00101000 2 match 1
34 43 10001000 2
45 54 00001001 2
56 65 00101000 2 match 1
67 76 00101000 2 match 1
70 07 00101001 3 match 0 6

02 20 00101001 3 match 0 6
13 31 00000100 1
24 42 00001001 2
35 53 00101000 2 match 1
46 64 00001000 1
57 75 00101001 3 match 0 6
60 06 00101000 2 match 1
71 17 00000000 a match 3

03 30 00101110 4
14 41 00000000 a match 3
25 52 00101001 3 match 0 6
36 63 00101000 2 match 1
47 74 00001001 2
50 05 00101001 3 match 0 6
61 16 00000000 a match 3
72 27 00101001 3 match 0 6

04 40 00001001 2
15 51 00000000 a match 3
26 62 00101000 2 match 1
37 73 00101000 2 match 1
